purpose: State how the operationalise attachment layer now relates to the main observer-geometry module.
core_result: The operationalise layer is a disciplined compiler from physical surfaces into finite declared positive objects, licensed module calls, record-only positive objects, gate decisions, or refusals.

module_handoffs.input_contract: declared finite SPD H and observer C
module_handoffs.licensed_claim: visible or sensor-channel precision in the declared coordinates only
module_handoffs.mandatory_boundary: does not license hidden load, full state inference, dynamics, damping, or coordinate-free interpretation

module_handoffs.input_contract: declared finite SPD H, observer C, ceiling/reference T, and executable T >= Phi check
module_handoffs.licensed_claim: hidden-load readout relative to the declared ceiling/reference
module_handoffs.mandatory_boundary: hidden-load language is refused from C alone or without T >= Phi

module_handoffs.input_contract: declared measurement equation, observation equation, likelihood, uncertainty model, or residual-estimated noise convention
module_handoffs.licensed_claim: local covariance, precision, Fisher, or analysis-function uncertainty record
module_handoffs.mandatory_boundary: does not license static storage Hessian, hidden load, or physical-constant claims without extra declarations

module_handoffs.input_contract: declared check standard, baseline, variability, and out-of-control rule
module_handoffs.licensed_claim: measurement process may proceed or must refuse before module contact
module_handoffs.mandatory_boundary: passing gate does not create H, Fisher precision, or hidden-load structure

module_handoffs.input_contract: explicit missing declaration or route mismatch
module_handoffs.licensed_claim: none; refusal is the correct operational object
module_handoffs.mandatory_boundary: a famous equation remains non-admissible until route declarations change

what_is_now_good: The storage and modal cards give runnable module inputs.
The hidden-load cards require an explicit ceiling/reference and executable dominance check.
The empirical probes show that data can produce information curvature without pretending to be storage geometry.
The process-control gate proves a pre-module refusal layer.
The refusal set is now part of the scientific result rather than cleanup.
what_is_still_weak: thermodynamic positive contact is still only a candidate route.
Acoustic/modal contact is clean mathematically but not yet apparatus-real.
Dynamic response and damping remain outside the static card runner.
The current local-positive records are not yet consumed directly by a main-module API surface.
wrap_recommendation: Wrap this phase as a v0 attachment grammar, not as a complete physical ontology. The next phase should choose one apparatus-grade measurement route and one thermodynamic refusal-plus-conditional-positive route.
